name: JV Management and Governance
text: The Joint Venture shall be managed by a Management Committee comprising equal representatives from each Party. Decisions of the Management Committee shall require unanimous consent for major decisions and a simple majority for routine operational decisions. Major decisions shall include: (a) approval of the annual budget; (b) any single expenditure exceeding the threshold specified in Schedule C; (c) entry into any third-party contract above the specified threshold; (d) any change in the scope of the Joint Venture; and (e) any admission of a new party to the Joint Venture. Each Party shall designate its representatives to the Management Committee in writing and may replace them at any time on written notice.
